issue_title: fix: Disable clue tooltips for Across clues in puzzle preview (constructor notes/comments) when downs-only mode is enabled
issue_body_preview: This PR elevates the `DownsOnlyContext` provider within the `Puzzle` component so `PuzzlePreview` can be included within its scope. This will make across clue tooltip previews behave correctly within the puzzle preview window, replacing the clue text with a "-", just like the clue list while solving
test_description_zh: 在 downs-only 模式下，打开谜题预览（构造者笔记/评论）窗口，将鼠标悬停在横向（Across）线索对应的方格上，观察弹出的工具提示（tooltip）内容。
expected_result_zh: 在 downs-only 模式启用时，谜题预览窗口中横向线索的工具提示应显示 '-' 而非实际线索文本，与求解界面中线索列表的行为保持一致。
